name: Lucky George's
about: Lucky George's is a premier gaming parlor in Quincy, IL, featuring a private Full Swing Golf Simulator alongside five state-of-the-art gaming machines. The venue offers a relaxed atmosphere where patrons can play video poker and slot games while enjoying cold beverages, or practice their golf on professional-grade courses. Open daily with extended hours, it serves as a casual spot for both gaming and golf entertainment. The golf simulator requires advance booking via phone, and the venue emphasizes a friendly, welcoming environment for casual play and socializing.
why_golfers_like_it: Professional Full Swing Golf Simulator access
Relaxed bar atmosphere for social golf sessions
Affordable golf and gaming combined experience
No membership required for casual play
Private golf simulator bay for focused practice

food_and_drink.notes: Full kitchen available with various food options
Full bar service with $1 domestic beer specials daily

simulator_hardware.notes: Private simulator bay with professional course access

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, golfers should bring their own clubs to use the Full Swing Golf Simulator.

faq.question: Can I bring food and drinks from outside?
faq.answer: No, outside food and drinks are not permitted as the venue offers a full bar and kitchen service.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: 18-hole rounds typically take 60-90 minutes depending on group size and pace of play.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: No, Lucky George's is an adults-only venue, requiring all patrons to be 21 years or older.
